action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval AUC 0.7598 from 1-layer LSTM (embed=64, hidden=128, dropout=0.5). Analysis: Simple model with strong regularization works best. Decision: Try improvements: (1) larger hidden with 1L, (2) skill difficulty bias, (3) ensemble approach. Also try training longer with lower LR.
